findings.evidence: New manual hom at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean:134-143`; existing forgetful hom at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Group.lean:151`; generic `MonoidHom.restrict`/`codRestrict` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Submonoid/Operations.lean:712` and `:744`.
findings.fix: Define it by restricting the existing homomorphism, e.g. use `Diffeomorph.toHomeomorphHom.restrict (fixingSubgroup ... s)` followed by `MonoidHom.codRestrict` with `toHomeomorph_mem_fixingSubgroup`.
findings.issue: `toRelativeHomeomorphHom` rebuilds the forgetful homomorphism on the relative subgroup, duplicating the existing `TauCeti.Diffeomorph.toHomeomorphHom` structure and its `map_one`/`map_mul` proofs.

summary: The current PR no longer contains the prior direct stabilizer duplicate, but one relative forgetful homomorphism still reimplements existing homomorphism infrastructure instead of restricting it.
